resources.string: You can change your name and username at any time
Select everything that resonates with you
How do you prefer to express yourself?
You can always change your mind
I prefer putting thoughts on paper
I\'m more comfortable talking it out
Before we begin, we want to be transparent about how we handle your data.
We collect mood, emotion, and journaling data to provide personalized insights and improve your experience.
Your diary entries are analyzed locally and via AI to offer reflections and suggestions. They are never shared with third parties.
If you use voice chat, audio is processed in real-time for the AI conversation and is not stored on our servers.
I have read and consent to the collection and processing of my wellness data as described above.
You can revoke consent and delete your data at any time from Settings.
You\'ll need to complete the setup to use the app.
Unlock the full potential of your journey
Everything unlimited: diaries, AI chat, avatar, insights, social
We\'re preparing Calmify PRO with exclusive features. Sign up for priority access and a special launch discount.
We\'ll notify you as soon as PRO is available. Thanks for believing in Calmify!

Calmify is NOT a medical device and does NOT provide diagnosis, treatment, or medical advice. Wellness features (mood tracking, journaling, AI chat) are self-reflection tools and DO NOT replace professional healthcare advice. If you are experiencing a crisis, contact your doctor or emergency services.
All your data will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
Deleting your account will permanently remove all your data. This action cannot be undone.
Thank you for taking time for yourself. Your answers have been saved and will be analyzed to offer you personalized wellness insights.
Start small. One habit at a time.
e.g. Sit down and close your eyes
Your diaries and conversations will appear here
With Calmify Pro you get unlimited conversations with Eve, advanced insights and much more.
How can I help you today?
Start a conversation to experience natural voice
With Calmify Pro you get live sessions up to 15 minutes with Eve and much more.
Allow camera access to enhance Gemini\'s visual understanding
Customize how Eve interacts with you
Test animations, visemes and idle loop
Help improve mental health research with anonymized data
Enable detailed psychological analysis and recommendations
Your personal information helps us provide tailored insights and recommendations.
Too little sleep can impact mental health
Try to aim for 7-9 hours for optimal well-being
Great! This is in the recommended range
Excessive sleep can also affect mood
Update your daily habits and routines
Lifestyle factors like sleep, exercise and social support influence your wellbeing.
How would you describe your social support network?
Your mental health information is confidential and used only to personalize your experience.
Have you been diagnosed with any mental health conditions?
This app is not a substitute for professional medical advice.
Update your goals and coping strategies
Setting clear goals and identifying effective coping strategies helps you make progress.
What do you want to achieve?
How do you like to cope?
Select coping strategies that work for you
Great! We\'ll use this to personalize your experience.
How do you want Eve to talk to you?
How often do you want to receive a writing reminder?
Eve won\'t bring up these topics unless you do first.
An error occurred in the UI
Would you like to share how you feel with the community?
What is blocking you right now?
Your intention for the next month
A detail, a color, a gesture, a sound...
What area does it relate to?
The words will come on their own...
How do they lower their emotional barriers?
e.g. Teasing, silent presence, concrete gestures...
e.g. Being ignored, feeling useless, silence...
How do they protect themselves emotionally?
e.g. Sarcasm, detachment, changing the subject...
How often do they want to interact?
What do they hope to get from conversations?
e.g. Better understanding themselves, having someone listen...
What do they NEVER want to be told?
e.g. Don\'t judge my choices, don\'t talk about...
The wound that never fully closes
What is absolutely non-negotiable for them?
The wound that never fully closes...
The thing they do better than anyone else...
e.g. Grew up in a Southern Italian family...
e.g. Spike Spiegel, Amelie Poulain, Naruto...
This is your home. Every day you find a personalized greeting and a summary of your journey.
From here you can access with one tap: diary, meditation, chat with Eve and much more.
Write how you feel, analyze your thoughts and build awareness over time.
Eve is your AI companion. She listens, reflects and helps you explore your emotions.
Track how you feel every day to discover patterns and trends in your wellbeing.
Deep analysis based on your diaries and conversations. Discover what truly moves you.
Build positive routines, one small step at a time.
See how you\'ve grown over time. Data, charts and reflections on your journey.
Connect with other inner explorers. Share what you want, hide the rest.
Too many attempts, try again later
Are you sure you want to sign out?
Failed to sign out. Please try again.
This action cannot be undone. All your diaries will be permanently deleted.
Type something in the bar above
Your avatar has been created successfully.
How do they react under pressure?
Take 2 minutes to check in on yourself
Answers are visible only to you and used to generate your insights.
This is your home. Every day you\'ll find a personalized greeting and a summary of how you\'re doing.
From here you can access your journal, meditation, energy check-in and more with one tap. Choose what you need today.
Your daily mood is shown here. Tap it to update or to see how it has changed over time.
Your avatar is always ready to listen. Tap it to start a voice or text conversation, anytime.
Account deleted. All data has been removed.
This section will be available soon.
The trend is improving compared to previous weeks.
The trend shows a decline — no need to panic, it\'s useful information.
Your path is consistent, and consistency has value.
Write more to get a complete picture.
Weekend morning, no rush. How do you feel today?
The afternoon is a good moment to pause. What do you notice within yourself?
The calm of yesterday — can you find it again tonight?
How satisfied are you with your life overall?
How satisfied are you with your work or studies?
How would you rate the quality of your relationships?
How present and mindful are you in the moment?
How much do you feel you have a purpose or direction in life?
How grateful do you feel for what you have?
How much do you feel in control of your choices and life?
How capable and competent do you feel in what you do?
How connected and close do you feel to important people in your life?
How lonely do you feel in this period?

Cognitive patterns are recurring schemas in the way you think and interpret situations. For example, always tending to catastrophize or seeing things only in black and white. Recognizing them doesn\'t mean you\'re \"broken\" — it\'s simply the first step to choosing different responses.

Sleeping well and feeling well are closely connected: fewer hours of sleep often translate into lower mood the next day. Calmify cross-references your sleep and mood notes over time to show this specific relationship in your life.

A psychological model identifying three fundamental needs for wellbeing: autonomy (feeling free to choose), competence (feeling capable), and connection (feeling close to others). When these three needs are met, motivation is authentic and lasting.

The trend shows how your overall wellbeing has changed over time, combining mood, energy, sleep and quality of reflections. Don\'t seek perfection: even a small constant improvement over time has a huge impact.

Measures how strongly you feel an emotion right now, regardless of which one. An intense emotion is neither good nor bad: it just shows how much it\'s involving you. Noticing intensity helps you understand which situations affect you most.
Stress is a natural body response to perceived challenges. Tracking your stress level over time helps identify the moments or contexts that weigh most on you, so you can act in a targeted way.

This scale captures your inner alert state right now. Anxiety is not a flaw: it\'s the brain trying to protect you. Logging it regularly lets you see recurring triggers and, over time, respond with more awareness.

Slow, mindful breathing activates the parasympathetic nervous system — the one that \"brakes\" the stress response. A few minutes are enough to feel a real difference in muscle tone and mental clarity.

A technique that links a new habit to one already established. Example: \"After breakfast, I write three things I\'m grateful for\". Using an existing behaviour as an \"anchor\" makes it much easier to build something new.

The smallest possible entry point for a habit. Instead of \"meditating for 30 minutes\", the minimum action is \"sit on the cushion\". Lowering the initial threshold makes it almost impossible not to start — and you often end up doing much more.
